name: Mayaobongro production cache rules
description: Conservative WooCommerce-safe cache rules created by Codex on 2026-07-11.

rules.description: Bypass cache for WooCommerce dynamic paths, admin/login, AJAX, and session cookies.
rules.expression: (http.request.uri.path contains "/wp-admin") or (http.request.uri.path eq "/wp-login.php") or (http.request.uri.path eq "/xmlrpc.php") or (starts_with(http.request.uri.path, "/cart")) or (starts_with(http.request.uri.path, "/checkout")) or (starts_with(http.request.uri.path, "/my-account")) or (starts_with(http.request.uri.path, "/wc-api")) or (http.request.uri.query contains "wc-ajax") or (http.request.uri.query contains "add-to-cart") or (http.cookie contains "wordpress_logged_in_") or (http.cookie contains "woocommerce_items_in_cart") or (http.cookie contains "woocommerce_cart_hash") or (http.cookie contains "wp_woocommerce_session_")

rules.description: Cache static assets at Cloudflare edge and browser for 30 days.
